name: Thales payShield
description: Payment HSM family securing card issuance, transaction processing, tokenization, and key management.

seo.title: Thales payShield — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Thales payShield: Payment HSM family securing card issuance, transaction processing, tokenization, and key management.

when_to_use: HSM-backed key management for card issuance and PIN generation
Tokenization and encryption for PCI-compliant payment processing
Transaction signing and cryptographic key protection for acquirers

pros: Deployable on-prem or in hosted models
cons: Hardware appliance, not a SaaS orchestrator
review.verdict: Gold-standard payment HSM for banks and processors; unrelated to merchant orchestration in practice.
review.best_for: Banks, issuers, and processors needing certified HSMs for card issuance and key management.
review.not_for: E-commerce merchants looking for a software-based orchestration or routing product.
